title: Readiness / Executable State Alignment
content: Readiness / Executable State Alignment

original.expected_behavior: Surface mismatch and classify according to documented exception status.
original.violation_behavior: Emit mismatch note or fail consistency if not documented.
original.remediation_guidance: Align readiness summary with executable state or mark as preserved sentinel.

title: Provider / Binding Consistency
content: Provider / Binding Consistency

trigger_conditions: provider missing or invalid while binding claims validated
original.expected_behavior: Binding must not validate without a valid provider chain.
original.remediation_guidance: Invalidate binding or restore valid provider chain.

title: Trust Block Terminality
content: Trust Block Terminality

trigger_conditions: trust_state contains trust_blocked and final readiness is not blocked
original.expected_behavior: Any trust block forces blocked readiness.
original.violation_behavior: Fail consistency and mark terminal violation.
original.remediation_guidance: Set final readiness to blocked whenever trust is blocked.

title: Expired Approval Cannot Be Execution-Ready
content: Expired Approval Cannot Be Execution-Ready

trigger_conditions: approval_state is approval_expired while chain remains execution-ready
original.expected_behavior: Expired approvals must block execution readiness.
original.remediation_guidance: Require a fresh approval before any execution-ready classification.

title: Invalid Rollback Cannot Be Execution-Ready
content: Invalid Rollback Cannot Be Execution-Ready

trigger_conditions: rollback invalid for risky action while chain remains execution-ready
original.expected_behavior: Rollback invalidity blocks risky execution readiness.
original.remediation_guidance: Provide a valid rollback policy before restoring readiness.

title: Blocked Outputs Must Emit Blocked Reasons
content: Blocked Outputs Must Emit Blocked Reasons

original.rule_name: Blocked Outputs Must Emit Blocked Reasons
trigger_conditions: final readiness blocked but blocked reason tokens/objects absent
original.expected_behavior: Blocked outputs emit stable blocked-reason tokens and objects.
original.remediation_guidance: Emit matching blocked reason tokens and rich blocked reason objects.

title: Tenant Boundary Is Terminal
content: Tenant Boundary Is Terminal

original.expected_behavior: Tenant violations force blocked readiness regardless of approval presence.
original.violation_behavior: Fail consistency and terminally block chain.
original.remediation_guidance: Restore tenant-compliant roots/apps/toolpacks before further validation.

title: Trust Blocked Is Terminal
content: Trust Blocked Is Terminal

original.expected_behavior: No execution-ready state may survive trust-blocked posture.
original.violation_behavior: Fail consistency and force blocked readiness.
original.remediation_guidance: Resolve trust assignment before any higher readiness class is allowed.

title: Provider Missing Precedes Approval
content: Provider Missing Precedes Approval

trigger_conditions: provider missing while approval state is present or required
original.expected_behavior: Provider absence blocks chain before approval can matter.
original.violation_behavior: Fail expectation or consistency if approval is treated as sufficient.
original.remediation_guidance: Restore provider chain before interpreting approval state.

title: Approval Presence Without Provider Validity
content: Approval Presence Without Provider Validity

trigger_conditions: approval present while provider invalid or missing
original.expected_behavior: Approval presence must not imply execution readiness without valid provider chain.
original.violation_behavior: Fail consistency if approval is treated as sufficient.
original.remediation_guidance: Re-establish provider validity before approval can have effect.
